what: Persist the project record to the SQLite database using INSERT OR REPLACE
why: Store the project metadata (id, name, path, git status, connected vaults) so it can be listed and managed across app sessions

output.console: Confirmation that the project was saved to the database

success_handling.criteria: INSERT OR REPLACE into the projects table completes without throwing

error_handling.criteria: db.run throws an error during INSERT OR REPLACE (e.g., database locked, schema mismatch, disk full)
error_handling.action: Return DB_WRITE_FAILED error with the underlying error message

event.message: Failed to save project to database: {error_message}

decisions.outcome: Return the complete project record — registration flow is complete
Abort registration, return DB_WRITE_FAILED error to user
